text = open("/mnt/data/file-RHyfyXANYTEHqeJ6FY8ShD-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()
def find_all(sub):
    res = []
    i = 0
    while True:
        j = text.find(sub, i)
        if j == -1:
            break
        res.append(j)
        i = j+1
    return res

markers = ('(aya_start)', '(aya_end)')
start_idx = text.find('(aya_start)')
end_idx = text.find('(aya_end)')
start_idx, end_idx, text[start_idx:end_idx+len('(aya_end)')]
len('(aya_start)'), len('(aya_end)')

ayah1 = text[start_idx+len('(aya_start)'):end_idx]
ayah1, len(ayah1)

# Find guillemet quotes
g_quotes = []
i = 0
while True:
    s = text.find('«', i)
    if s == -1:
        break
    e = text.find('»', s+1)
    if e == -1:
        break
    g_quotes.append((s, e, text[s+1:e]))
    i = e+1
len(g_quotes), g_quotes[:20]

import re

text = open("/mnt/data/file-RHyfyXANYTEHqeJ6FY8ShD-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

citations = []

def add_span(start, end, ctype):
    # Ensure no leading/trailing whitespace/punctuation per rules
    # Trim spaces and edge punctuation characters including Arabic punctuation and ellipses
    # Define punctuation to strip from edges
    edge_punct = ' \t\n\r"\'«»()[]،؛:.!,!؟?…'  # include Arabic question mark and comma, period
    # Expand set with western parentheses etc
    # Also dots .. to be trimmed by including the period char; repeated will strip multiple
    # We'll trim iteratively
    orig_start, orig_end = start, end
    # Convert to python slicing
    while start < end and text[start] in edge_punct:
        start += 1
    while end > start and text[end-1] in edge_punct:
        end -= 1
    span_text = text[start:end]
    citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": ctype})
    return (orig_start, orig_end, start, end, span_text)

# 1) Ayah between markers
start_marker = text.find('(aya_start)')
end_marker = text.find('(aya_end)')
ayah1_s = start_marker + len('(aya_start)')
ayah1_e = end_marker
r = add_span(ayah1_s, ayah1_e, "Aya")
r

# Add all content inside straight double quotes as Hadith
subs = []
i = 0
while True:
    start = text.find('"', i)
    if start == -1:
        break
    end = text.find('"', start+1)
    if end == -1:
        break
    subs.append((start+1, end)) # inside quotes
    i = end+1

added = []
for s,e in subs:
    info = add_span(s, e, "Hadeeth")
    added.append(info)
len(added), added[:5], citations[-1]

# Add guillemet quotes as hadith, except when text is "وبعد"
i = 0
count = 0
g_spans = []
while True:
    s = text.find('«', i)
    if s == -1:
        break
    e = text.find('»', s+1)
    if e == -1:
        break
    inner_start = s+1
    inner_end = e
    content = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    if content.strip() != "وبعد":
        info = add_span(inner_start, inner_end, "Hadeeth")
        g_spans.append(info)
        count += 1
    i = e+1

count, g_spans[:5], citations[-1]

phrase = "أَفَرَأَيْتَ إِنْ كَانَ فِي أَخِي مَا أَقُولُ؟"
pos = text.find(phrase)
pos, phrase

add_span(pos, pos+len(phrase), "Hadeeth")
citations[-1]

# Add ayah in [2]

verse2_endparenpos = text.find('(١٢)', verse2_start)
verse2 = text[verse2_start:verse2_endparenpos].rstrip()
add_span(verse2_start, verse2_start+len(verse2), "Aya")
citations[-1]

start = text.find("وَلا يَغْتَبْ بَعْضُكُمْ بَعْضاً")
add_span(start, start+len("وَلا يَغْتَبْ بَعْضُكُمْ بَعْضاً"), "Aya")
citations[-1]

start = 3361
end = text.find("مَيْتاً", start) + len("مَيْتاً")
add_span(start, end, "Aya")
citations[-1]

start = 3605
end = start + len("فَكَرِهْتُمُوهُ")
add_span(start, end, "Aya")
citations[-1]
len(citations)

citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x['span_start'])
citations_sorted
